content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Clean implementation. All 6 tests pass (happy path, blocked path, restart/resume, tool failure, sequential enforcement, plus a bonus failure-reconciliation integration test). Only test files were added/modified — no production code changes. All 800 existing tests still pass, clippy is clean (-D warnings), fmt check passes. The tests are deterministic (mock adapters, temp workspaces, no timing dependencies), cover the 5 specified scenarios, and verify state transitions, journal events, snapshot progress, and structured log fields. No correctness bugs, safety issues, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
